2.description: get 200-year flood polygons intersecting Drammen bbox

3.description: get quick-clay mapping polygons intersecting Drammen bbox

4.description: get parcels in Drammen larger than 5000 m2

5.description: find parcels that intersect 200-year flood zones

6.description: compute distance from flooded parcels to nearest quick-clay zone

7.description: collapse to one row per parcel with MIN(distance_m)

args.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn,
       ST_XMin(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS xmin,
       ST_YMin(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS ymin,
       ST_XMax(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS xmax,
       ST_YMax(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS ymax
FROM kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%drammen%'
GROUP BY kommunenummer, kommunenavn;

args.sql:
WITH bbox AS (
  SELECT ST_Envelope(omrade) AS geom
  FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
  WHERE kommunenummer = '3301'
)
SELECT objid, objtype, flomarealid, gjentaksintervall, omrade
FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal, bbox
WHERE gjentaksintervall = 200
  AND ST_Intersects(flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal.omrade, bbox.geom);

args.sql:
WITH bbox AS (
  SELECT ST_Envelope(omrade) AS geom
  FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
  WHERE kommunenummer = '3301'
)
SELECT objid, objtype, flomarealid, gjentaksintervall, omrade
FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal AS f
JOIN bbox ON ST_Intersects(f.omrade, bbox.geom)
WHERE f.gjentaksintervall = 200;

FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal AS f
WHERE f.gjentaksintervall = 200
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune k
    WHERE k.kommunenummer = '3301'
      AND ST_Intersects(f.omrade, k.omrade)
  );

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%drammen%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [flomsoner]
WITH bbox AS (
  SELECT ST_Envelope(omrade) AS geom
  FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
  WHERE kommunenummer = '3301'
)
SELECT objid, objtype, flomarealid, gjentaksintervall, omrade
FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal AS f
JOIN bbox ON ST_Intersects(f.omrade, bbox.geom)
WHERE f.gjentaksintervall = 200;
guard_error: {"executed": false, "error": "tool_validate_sql blocked.", "reason": "Step 2 has exhausted its SQL repair budget (2 attempts). Produce a new plan.", "step": 2, "action": "query"}

2.sql:
WITH bbox AS (
  SELECT ST_Envelope(omrade) AS geom
  FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
  WHERE kommunenummer = '3301'
)
SELECT objid, objtype, flomarealid, gjentaksintervall, omrade
FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal AS f
JOIN bbox ON ST_Intersects(f.omrade, bbox.geom)
WHERE f.gjentaksintervall = 200;

1.description: get Drammen municipality number and geometry

2.description: select parcels (teig) in Drammen with area > 5000 m²

3.description: obtain 200-year flood polygons within Drammen (inspect and filter by return period)

4.description: find parcels that intersect the 200-year flood polygons

5.description: get quick-clay hazard polygons within Drammen

6.description: compute distances from affected parcels to quick-clay polygons

7.description: collapse to one row per parcel with minimum distance

8.description: sort parcels by distance ascending, tie-breaker parcel id ascending

args.sql:
SELECT teigid, matrikkelnummertekst, lagretberegnetareal, kommunenummer, omrade
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '3301'
  AND lagretberegnetareal > 5000;

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%drammen%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, matrikkelnummertekst, lagretberegnetareal, kommunenummer, omrade
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '3301'
  AND lagretberegnetareal > 5000;

2.sql:
SELECT teigid, matrikkelnummertekst, lagretberegnetareal, kommunenummer, omrade
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '3301'
  AND lagretberegnetareal > 5000;

2.description: get 200-year flood polygons intersecting the municipality (will use municipality geometry from step 1 to reduce national layer)

3.description: get parcels >5000 m² within the municipality (use municipality geometry from step 1)

4.description: find parcels that intersect 200-year flood polygons (join step3 parcels with step2 flood polygons)

5.description: get quick-clay hazard polygons intersecting the municipality (use municipality geometry from step 1)

6.description: compute distances from flooded parcels (step4) to quick-clay polygons (step5)

7.description: collapse to one row per parcel with MIN(distance_m)

SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%drammen%';
